# Examples — fix-static-analysis

## Basic Usage

```text
Fix all static analysis violations in the ATM project, starting with severity 1 issues.
Run analysis, show me each fix, then apply them and verify the results.
```

## Fix Only Critical Issues

```text
Fix only severity 1 static analysis violations in the project.
```

## Full Automatic Fix

```text
Automatically fix all C/C++test static analysis violations and re-run the analysis to confirm there are no remaining issues.
```
